rule_text: Advances to AP contractors/labourers employed on Revenue Department works in Scheduled Areas may be granted only by the Agent to Government Visakhapatnam in EXCEPTIONAL CIRCUMSTANCES; advance must not exceed 50% of estimate amount OR Rs.100 (whichever is LESS); security should be taken for summary recovery; advance must be adjusted in the first bill or part-bill for work done.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND Sector=ScheduledArea AND TenderType IN [Works] AND ContractorAdvance=true
verification_method: Scheduled-area contractor advance: <= min(50% of estimate, Rs.100) + security on file + first-bill adjustment
